mapper.select: SELECT * FROM cf_transfer_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY transferred_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cf_transfer_record (id, user_id, account_book_id, from_account_id, to_account_id, amount, fee, remark, transferred_at, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{accountBookId}, #{fromAccountId}, #{toAccountId}, #{amount}, #{fee}, #{remark}, #{transferredAt}, #{createdAt})
